pages.text:
BID PROPOSAL FOR SUPPLY OF MEDICAL
EQUIPMENT
Tender Reference No: TND-2025-0001
To: The Deputy Inspector General (Procurement), CRPF HQ, New Delhi
1. BIDDER QUALIFICATION SUMMARY
In response to Tender No. TND-2025-0001, we hereby submit our technical and financial bid. We
confirm that we meet all eligibility criteria [cite: 71, 72].
Criterion Bidder Compliance Statement
Annual Turnover (> Rs. 2 Cr) Complied (Audited Balance Sheets for FY 22-23, 23-24, 24-25
attached) [cite: 74, 82]
Experience (> 5 Years) Complied (Experience in Govt/PSU/Defence supply since 2019)
[cite: 74, 82]
ISO 13485:2016 Complied (Valid Medical Devices QMS Certificate attached) [cite:
74, 82]
Non-Blacklisting Confirmed (Notarised Self-Declaration on Rs. 100 Stamp Paper
attached) [cite: 77, 82]
2. TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS COMPLIANCE
Item Qty Compliance with Tender Specifications [cite: 68]
Ventilator (ICU Grade) 20 Complied: Invasive/Non-Invasive; FiO2: 21-100%; 4hr Battery; CE/FDA
Approved.
Defibrillator 30 Complied: Biphasic; AED mode; 1-360 J; 12-lead ECG; IP44 rated.
(Biphasic)
Patient Monitor 50 Complied: ECG, SpO2, NIBP, EtCO2; 12-inch TFT; LAN/Wi-Fi connectivity.
3. COMMERCIAL TERMS & COMMITMENTS
• Bid Validity: 180 Days from the date of submission [cite: 98].
• Delivery Period: Delivery, installation, and commissioning within 120 days of PO [cite: 98].
• Warranty: 3 Years comprehensive on-site warranty for all equipment [cite: 98].
• Performance Security: We agree to furnish 10% PBG within 15 days of award [cite: 98].
• Payment Terms: Acceptance of 30/60/10% payment tranche system [cite: 101].

pages.text:
4. FINANCIAL BID SUMMARY
The total estimated tender value is Rs. 50,00,000/- [cite: 59]. Our competitive financial bid is
enclosed in the separate Financial Bid envelope as per the Two-Bid System [cite: 87].
__________________________
(Authorized Signatory)
With Company Seal
Date: May 07, 2026
